entry.title: Restarting Nuclear Power Plants: Preserving and Restoring Value - EPRI Journal
entry.summary: Share this article:Recent growth in electricity demand, expanding carbon-free energy goals, and renewed concerns about energy security are driving utilities to reconsider nuclear power plants that have been permanently shut down or are approaching retirement. EPRI examines the technical, regulatory, and business factors that influence whether these facilities can return to service and what steps [вА¶]

entry.title: Why Grid Models Need a Solid Data Foundation - EPRI Journal
entry.summary: Share this article:By Chris Warren The distribution grid isnвАЩt what it used to be. Traditionally, the lower-voltage grid carried electricity in one direction from large power plants to businesses and residents who needed it. Though distribution grids have always been inherently complex, the one-way flow of electrons from power plants and the transmission grid to [вА¶]

entry.title: EPRI's Roadmap for a Rapidly Growing Battery Storage Industry - EPRI Journal
entry.summary: Share this article:By Chris Warren Installations of battery energy storage are rapidly accelerating across the globe. According to the International Energy Agency (IEA), 108 GW of new battery storage was deployed globally in 2025, an increase of 40% over 2024 and 11 times more than in 2021. A similar story is playing out in the [вА¶]

entry.title: The Long Wait - EPRI Journal
entry.summary: Share this article:How EPRI helped JapanвАЩs nuclear industry navigate an extended shutdown, modernize for the future, and generate valuable lessons for the rest of the world The second in a series of three articles about EPRIвАЩs long-term commitment to the Japanese nuclear industry post-Fukushima examines the days and weeks after the 2011 tsunami. By Chris [вА¶]

entry.title: The Electric Airport - EPRI Journal
entry.summary: Share this article:A new EPRI offering draws on decades of experience and wide-ranging expertise to help airports prepare for an electric liftoff. By Chris Warren Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) is a city within a city. The airport covers 5.5 square miles and regularly serves well over 70 million passengers annually, making it one of [вА¶]

entry.title: Fire Safety Considerations for Electric Vehicles and Charging Stations - EPRI Journal
entry.summary: Share this article:What Fleet Managers Need to Know As electric vehicles (EVs) become an increasingly common part of commercial and utility fleets, questions around fire safety arise. While available data indicate that fires involving electric vehicles may occur less frequently than those involving internal combustion engine (ICE) vehicles, EVs present unique hazardsвАФparticularly when a fire [вА¶]

entry.title: Beyond Billing: How Utilities Can Unlock the Full Value of Advanced Metering Infrastructure - EPRI Journal
entry.summary: Share this article:By Chris Warren Judging by the numbers alone, the rollout of advanced metering infrastructure (AMI) has been an undeniable success. Utilities such as Pacific Gas & Electric (PG&E) and Florida Power & Light (FP&L) were among the first to launch ambitious smart meter deployments in the mid- to late 2000s. It was the [вА¶]

entry.title: Synthetic Customer Load Data: Approaches, Limitations, and the Role of Generative AI - EPRI Journal
entry.summary: Share this article:Electric utilities are navigating a period of rapid change driven by electrification, renewable energy integration, climate variability, and evolving customer behavior. These trends are placing new demands on planning processes that have historically relied on empirical load data, such as advanced metering infrastructure (AMI) records or curated reference datasets. While these data sources [вА¶]

entry.title: Why Data Readiness is One of UtilitiesвАЩ Most Urgent AI Challenges - EPRI Journal
entry.summary: Share this article:Realizing AI potential starts with getting data right. By Chris Warren In a relatively short period of time, artificial intelligence (AI) has become the centerpiece of discussions across most industries, including the utility industry. Much of the recent focus has been on utilitiesвАЩ ability to meet the growing demand for electricity coming from [вА¶]

entry.title: Epri Journal No 2 Spring
entry.summary: пњљпњљпњљ;пњљпњљпњљпњљ9^{пњљпњљ=?пњљdпњљпњљпњљпњљcCsпњљпњљ$tNб°ї_?iпњљfпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљUпњљпњљпњљKпњљлІТyпњљ%ѕТG8пњљћЄпњљ'y.$пњљ$пњљ{OпњљO‘ШeNпњљCпњљ61RuпњљпњљпњљMпњљwпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљ)пњљењЙ-пњљZNпњљпњљпњљпњљRпњљ'пњљCu]\пњљпњљ(dпњљпњљпњљMпњљЁє9;пњљпњљпњљ8fdпњљпњљZпњљ≈ЈпњљпњљjпњљWm!\:пњљпњљOMbM пњљпњљvпњљпњљIпњљkwёЫпњљпњљ\пњљ4пњљ=пњљYпњљ0"пњљпњљзЇ™sџТпњљЌЊпњљпњљ%пњљпњљпњљZ“®q%пњљпњљm«єпњљпњљ!Mпњљпњљпњљ«ђ ґпњљпњљпњљпњљp-пњљпњљ9.UпњљЎЃпњљвОҐпњљпњљпњљA-пњљпњљ{x8}пњљJпњљпњљoпњљпњљ8пњљпњљ=0пњљпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљ6?u7пњљ{пњљЌЂпњљпњљbX\&EH1пњљ\:пњљdc,пњљпњљi6 пњљпњљ-пњљ+nпњљпњљ| пњљOUпњљ1пњљпњљaпњљx_-oпњљ~пњљпњљпњљeпњљпњљпњљ„Я/пњљEпњљ8пњљпњљпњљ1пњљvPNпњљпњљ’Ы%Y`пњљg rпњљ' пњљпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљE#пњљ*xпњљ5пњљc<пњљ'пњљ«®пњљo$пњљпњљ.пњљпњљGпњљпњљ;пњљпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљX~>eпњљпњљпњљ№Ппњљ—µ,YпњљIпњљKkhпњљKпњљ.hпњљKElпњљпњљпњљ\"пњљпњљa!fпњљ.пњљпњљnpпњљпњљHпњљ*$пњљпњљпњљIпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљ7пњљпњљbпњљ&qjGPпњљпњљпњљIпњљZ-*|пњљLпњљRпњљ:пњљGCRпњљjQuL 7IEFSd' 5пњљпњљпњљпњљZ9пњљgпњљпњљF_пњљ{>пњљ”ЭqkпњљпњљпњљmпњљпњљпњљЎТTN#пњљX.пњљhпњљпњљZ%eX9пњљ!пњљяЗпњљвҐІSпњљF~\пњљпњљпњљпњљпњљ…ЃпњљпњљpпњљPпњљr-пњљпњљпњљпњљпњљ"пњљ?QD5 пњљпњљMпњљ Aпњљ,`пњљ/пњљпњљ-!пњљпњљпњљFпњљў°VMпњљbSOпњљ№Бпњљ2пњљпњљ%/пњљqпњљпњљпњљI7' ЃпњљпњљK%+пњљпњљ|пњљпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљDrxvпњљNпњљпњљ>_dSЌѓпњљ-Uпњљпњљmпњљ,пњљпњљпњљпњљ\пњљNпњљZfkпњљpoпњљпњљ<пњљпњљпњљ7)пњљпњљZ)5$пњљпњљ<пњљпњљ&Uпњљ–±пњљ%пњљпњљпњљпњљ 8пњљ:пњљпњљё±пњљпњљпњљ”Зпњљmпњљo{qпњљпњљs d%пњљпњљпњљпњљ[пњљ;пњљпњљ#пњљпњљHпњљпњљ|>Eпњљпњљпњљ1пњљпњљ5пњљпњљ" пњљпњљ8Xпњљпњљпњљпњљ~пњљd:kпњљпњљпњљЁЃпњљпњљ&пњљпњљ\пњљ[a7пњљ+пњљпњљџ±$пњљwпњљпњљ>Zпњљm,пњљпњљпњљ4пњљY>пњљ5пњљпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљUпњљпњљ7пњљпњљEпњљ>пњљпњљпњљXпњљ

entry.title: PJM Board Approves Transmission Project Addition, Changes To Support Grid Reliability | PJM Inside Lines
entry.summary: The PJM Board of Managers has authorized an immediate-need reliability project and changes to existing projects in the Regional Transmission Expansion Plan (RTEP) to help provide the most efficient, economical and reliable supply of power for the 67 million people PJM serves across 13 states and the District of Columbia.

entry.title: PJM Hot Weather Operations Update вАУ July 15, 2026 | PJM Inside Lines
entry.summary: Maximum Generation Alert Issued for July 16; Hot Weather Alert Continues Through July 17

entry.title: PJM Capacity Auction Procures 138,318 MW of Generation Resources as Work Continues To Address Growing Electricity Demand | PJM Inside Lines
entry.summary: Price Comes in at FERC-Approved Cap, Down 2.5%; Total Capacity Cleared Is 6,831 MW Short of Reliability Requirement

entry.title: PJM Hot Weather Operations Update вАУ July 14, 2026 | PJM Inside Lines
entry.summary: Maximum Generation Alert Issued for July 15; Hot Weather Alert Extended Through July 17

entry.title: Hot Weather Alert Issued for July 14вАУ17 | PJM Inside Lines
entry.summary: PJM has issued a Hot Weather Alert for the entire region PJM serves for July 14вАУ17 ahead of expected 90-plus-degree weather.

entry.title: PJM Serves Load Through Record-Breaking July Heat | PJM Inside Lines
entry.summary: PJM maintained reliable operations July 2 through a preliminary energy use record, requiring all available generation to keep the power flowing.

entry.title: Day-Long Planning Process Education Session Set for July 16 | PJM Inside Lines
entry.summary: PJM is hosting a special session of the Transmission Expansion Advisory Committee on July 16 to provide an overview of the annual planning process for a general audience, including how PJM determines when new transmission is needed, how projects are selected and how the public can participate.

entry.title: PJM Hot Weather Operations Update: July 3 | PJM Inside Lines
entry.summary: Hot Weather Alert Remains in Effect Through July 4 and into July 5 for Mid-Atlantic and Dominion Zones

entry.title: PJM Hot Weather Operations Update вАУ July 2, 2026 | PJM Inside Lines
entry.summary: Maximum Generation Alert Issued for July 3; Hot Weather Alert Remains in Effect Through July 4

entry.title: PJM Hot Weather Operations Update вАУ July 1, 2026 | PJM Inside Lines
entry.summary: Hot Weather Alert Continues Through at Least July 3; Maximum Generation and Load Management Alert Issued for July 2
